name: Mushrooms with Wild Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb White button mushrooms, sliced (about 2-1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
Rice: Place rice, water, and soy sauce in a saucepan with a tight-fitting lid. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and cook over medium heat until liquid has evaporated and rice is tender, about 1 hour. Set aside.
Mushrooms: In a large pan, place onion, celery, and water. Cook and stir for several minutes, until vegetables soften slightly. Add white button mushrooms, shiitake mushrooms, and oyster mushrooms. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes. Gently stir in cooked rice, enoki mushrooms, snow peas, red bell pepper, and seasonings. Cook over low heat for another 15 minutes.
